Shubman Gill’s T20I Spot ‘Under Threat’, Says Ashwin

Nov 13, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Shubman Gill’s T20I Spot ‘Under Threat’, Says Ashwin

Indian spinner Ravichandran Ashwin has suggested that Shubman Gill’s T20I spot is far from secure, highlighting competition and the need for consistent performances.
